dialects: rung 1 of 5 - fully formal clinical register around the fixed term|rung 2 of 5 - mostly clinical register, one everyday word allowed|rung 3 of 5 - even mix of clinical and everyday phrasing|rung 4 of 5 - mostly casual everyday phrasing|rung 5 of 5 - maximally casual spoken phrasing with slang
_note: ladder n=10: dose-response rungs over ten downgrade baselines
